state.description:
The state of a draft security that describes the lifecycle stage of the draft security and determines the actions that can be performed on it.

 - DRAFT_SECURITY_STATE_DRAFTING: The draft security has been created and is in an editable state
 - DRAFT_SECURITY_STATE_PENDING_BOARD_APPROVAL: The draft has been submitted for board approval and is in a read-only state
 - DRAFT_SECURITY_STATE_ISSUED: The draft has been sent to signatories to be signed and issued and is in a read-only state

stockOptionType.description:
- STOCK_OPTION_TYPE_ISO: Incentive Stock Option
 - STOCK_OPTION_TYPE_NSO: Non-qualified Stock Option
 - STOCK_OPTION_TYPE_INTL: International Stock Option
 - STOCK_OPTION_TYPE_EMI: Employee Management Incentive
 - STOCK_OPTION_TYPE_CSOP: Company Share Option Plan
 - STOCK_OPTION_TYPE_102_CG: 102 Capital Gains Track
 - STOCK_OPTION_TYPE_102_OI: 102 Ordinary Income Track
 - STOCK_OPTION_TYPE_NON_TRUSTEE: Non-Trustee Stock Option
 - STOCK_OPTION_TYPE_3I: 3(i) Stock Option
 - STOCK_OPTION_TYPE_UNAPPROVED: Unapproved Stock Option
stockOptionType.title: The type of the option grant

-456.0
.321
+1.23456e-3
1e-05

acceleration.name: Change in control
acceleration.terms: All unvested shares shall vest upon a change of control.

templateId.description: The template id of the vesting schedule.

year.description: Year of date. Use 0 if specifying a date without a year.

month.description: Month of year. Use 0 if specifying a year without a month and day.

day.description:
Day of month. Must be from 1 to 31 and valid for the year and month, or 0
if specifying a year by itself or a year and month where the day is not
significant.

startDate.description:
* A full date, with non-zero year, month and day values
* A month and day value, with a zero year, e.g. an anniversary
* A year on its own, with zero month and day values
* A year and month value, with a zero day, e.g. a credit card expiration date
startDate.title:
Represents a whole or partial calendar date, e.g. a birthday. The time of day
and time zone are either specified elsewhere or are not significant. The date
is relative to the Proleptic Gregorian Calendar. This can represent:

terms.description: Detailed terms of accelerated vesting of the draft option grant.

vesting.description: Vesting details of the option grant

voluntaryTerminationCount.description: The quantity of "periods" (days, months or years) after voluntary termination that the stakeholder has to exercise their options.

voluntaryTerminationPeriod.title:
- EXERCISE_PERIOD_DAY: The exercise period will be expressed in days
 - EXERCISE_PERIOD_MONTH: The exercise period will be expressed in months
 - EXERCISE_PERIOD_YEAR: The exercise period will be expressed in years

involuntaryTerminationCauseCount.description: The quantity of "periods" (days, months or years) after involuntary termination that the stakeholder has to exercise their options.

involuntaryTerminationCausePeriod.title:
- EXERCISE_PERIOD_DAY: The exercise period will be expressed in days
 - EXERCISE_PERIOD_MONTH: The exercise period will be expressed in months
 - EXERCISE_PERIOD_YEAR: The exercise period will be expressed in years

involuntaryTerminationCount.description: The quantity of "periods" (days, months or years) after involuntary termination that the stakeholder has to exercise their options.

involuntaryTerminationPeriod.title:
- EXERCISE_PERIOD_DAY: The exercise period will be expressed in days
 - EXERCISE_PERIOD_MONTH: The exercise period will be expressed in months
 - EXERCISE_PERIOD_YEAR: The exercise period will be expressed in years

deathExerciseCount.description: The quantity of "periods" (days, months or years) after death that the stakeholder has to exercise their options.

deathExercisePeriod.title:
- EXERCISE_PERIOD_DAY: The exercise period will be expressed in days
 - EXERCISE_PERIOD_MONTH: The exercise period will be expressed in months
 - EXERCISE_PERIOD_YEAR: The exercise period will be expressed in years

disabilityExerciseCount.description: The quantity of "periods" (days, months or years) after disability that the stakeholder has to exercise their options.

disabilityExercisePeriod.title:
- EXERCISE_PERIOD_DAY: The exercise period will be expressed in days
 - EXERCISE_PERIOD_MONTH: The exercise period will be expressed in months
 - EXERCISE_PERIOD_YEAR: The exercise period will be expressed in years

retirementExerciseCount.description: The quantity of "periods" (days, months or years) after retirement that the stakeholder has to exercise their options.

retirementExercisePeriod.title:

 - EXERCISE_PERIOD_MONTH: The exercise period will be expressed in months
 - EXERCISE_PERIOD_YEAR: The exercise period will be expressed in years

exercisePeriods.description: Exercise periods for the draft option grant. If unset, values will be inherited from the equity plan

name.description:
The name of the document.

This is an output-only field and values provided by clients will be ignored when creating.

url.description:
The URL of the document.

This is an output-only field and values provided by clients will be ignored when creating.

fileId.description:
The file identifier of the document.

Files must be uploaded first through the [Upload File](https://docs.carta.com/carta/reference/v1alpha1filesuploadfile) endpoint before their file identifiers can be referenced here.

additionalDocuments.description:
Details about other additional documents.

Max of 100 items.

documents.description:
Documents that are relevant to a draft option grant.

These documents are attached to a specific draft option grant object and will be associated with the resulting option grant once the draft is approved.

draftOptionGrant.description:
A draft option grant is an object that is the precursor of an option grant before it is approved, signed, and issued.

The "draft" prefix is used to differentiate it from the final option grant object.

description: The request for the CreateDraftOptionGrant endpoint.
